name: Student's t-test
applicable_scenarios: compare the mean of a sample to a known value (one-sample)
compare means of two independent samples (two-sample)
compare paired measurements before and after treatment (paired)
typical_cases: A/B test of two website conversion rates (means of continuous metrics)
compare exam scores between two schools
pre/post weight change in a diet study
common_pitfalls: assumes approximate normality; for small n (<20) with skew, use a rank test
two-sample t with unequal variances needs Welch's correction
correlated observations violate independence; prefer paired t or mixed models
multiple comparisons inflate Type-I error; correct with Bonferroni or FDR
